items.title: Gardening Workshop
items.description: Free for all members. Would you like to create a thriving vegetable garden and a beautiful flower garden?
items.longDescription: Are you interested in learning how to grow vegetables, cultivate flowers, prevent and control garden pests and diseases, and maintain a lush, healthy lawn? The Ottawa Friendship Club warmly invites you to join our practical and enjoyable Backyard Gardening Workshop. Set in a beautiful private garden, this hands-on event offers an opportunity to learn gardening techniques, exchange growing experiences, and make new friends in a relaxed and welcoming atmosphere.
items.capacity: Limited to 50 participants (first come, first served)
speakers: Dr. Han Shuyou (Ph.D. in Agriculture) — vegetable gardening, flower cultivation, pest and disease management, and lawn care.
"Kai Kai Xin Xin" – Owner of Happy Garden — years of hands-on home gardening experience and practical tips for a beautiful backyard garden.

items.title: 🎉 Ottawa Friendship Club First Anniversary Celebration 渥太华联谊会成立一周年庆祝活动 🎉
items.location: Room 203, Jack Purcell Community Centre, 320 Jack Purcell Lane, Ottawa (near downtown)
items.description:
The Ottawa Friendship Club warmly invites all members to join us as we celebrate the first anniversary of our establishment!

Over the past year, our club has grown into a vibrant and welcoming community where members connect through friendship, culture, wellness, and lifelong learning. This special celebration is an opportunity to reflect on our journey, showcase our talented members, and enjoy an afternoon of music, dance, and fellowship.
items.longDescription:
Event Highlights: 

* Welcome 
* A brief presentation by the Club leadership on the history and development of the Ottawa Friendship Club
* Performances by all club teams, with each group presenting two or three of their best singing and dance performances
* Social dancing and peer interaction

* Refreshments will be provided

🚗 Free parking available

We look forward to celebrating this special milestone with you!

items.title: Health & Self-Care Workshop for Seniors
items.description: Learn practical skills to manage your health with confidence. Topics include safe medication use, caring for yourself when you are ill, recognizing the warning signs of a heart attack and stroke, and knowing when and how to seek medical help. Free for all members.

items.title: Chinatown Night Market Performance
items.description: For this year's Chinatown Night Market, the Ottawa Friendship Club's Senior Song and Dance Troupe and Ballroom and Latin Dance Team were invited to perform, presenting a vibrant artistic showcase to audiences from diverse cultural backgrounds.
